---
title: Cross-Validation of Optimized Composites for Preclinical Alzheimer’s
date: "2016-07-25"
categories: [AAIC2016, composites, cross-validation, preclincal AD]
summary: Cross-validating optimized cognitive composites.
---

## Slides and poster from AAIC 2016, Toronto

[Slides from PIA Day at AAIC 2016: Clinical Trials Advancement and Methods](AAIC_PIA_2016_composite_cv.pdf)

[Poster P3-034](AAIC_poster_2016.pdf)
